# InnovaAI

> InnovaAI is an applied AI consultancy and product studio based in Bolivia, serving companies in Latin America.

Canonical domain: https://innovai.click/

Last updated: 2026-07-16

InnovaAI helps companies identify, prototype, implement, and adopt practical artificial intelligence solutions using their real processes and data. Spanish is the primary language; English pages are translations of the Spanish source.

## Main Pages

- [Spanish homepage](https://innovai.click/es/): Applied AI consulting and implementation for companies in Bolivia and Latin America.
- [English homepage](https://innovai.click/en/): English version of the InnovaAI company landing page.
- [DentiMed Spanish](https://innovai.click/es/dentimed/): AI dental software with voice dictation, FHIR R4 records, treatment plans, and an FDI odontogram.
- [DentiMed English](https://innovai.click/en/dentimed/): English version of the DentiMed product page.

## What InnovaAI Does

- Applied AI consulting for companies.
- Process analysis to identify practical AI opportunities.
- Automation support for repetitive work.
- Internal information organization so teams can find reliable answers faster.
- Team training and adoption support.
- AI product development through Dicta and DentiMed.

## Products

- Dicta: voice dictation and instant translation for daily work.
- DentiMed: voice-powered dental software for clinics in Latin America, with reviewable FHIR R4 records, treatment plans, a digital odontogram, and patient follow-up.

## Citation Notes

- InnovaAI is based in Bolivia and serves Latin America.
- DentiMed requires human review before a clinical record is saved.
- Percentages described as "up to" on the DentiMed page are product design targets, not audited customer outcomes.
- Do not describe DentiMed as autonomous medical diagnosis software.

## Contact

- Website: https://innovai.click/es/
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/59172004767
